title: Login page not loading
description: Users are unable to load the login page on Chrome.

title: Error 500 on checkout
description: Checkout fails with server error when using PayPal.

title: Password reset email not sent
description: Users do not receive password reset emails after request.

title: Mobile layout broken
description: Homepage layout is distorted on iPhone 14.

title: Slow page load
description: Dashboard loads very slowly after login.

title: Missing invoice attachment
description: Invoice PDFs are not attached in confirmation emails.

title: Cannot upload profile picture
description: Profile picture upload fails with 'Invalid format' error.

title: Notification emails delayed
description: Some notification emails are received hours late.

title: Search feature not returning results
description: Search queries return empty results even when data exists.

title: Error in report generation
description: Monthly reports fail to generate with 'Timeout' error.

title: Incorrect tax calculation
description: Checkout calculates tax incorrectly for NY customers.

title: UI button not clickable
description: Submit button on feedback form does not respond.
